zh.lifeSummary: 當Judith von Henneberg-Coburg於1247年出生在賀爾左圖姆 薩辛-可包格 武德 格塔可包格時，她的父親Hermann I. Graf von Henneberg23歲，母親Margaretha van Holland13歲。她於1268年10月22日與Otto V. Markgraf von Brandenburg在德國布藍登波格布藍登波格 安 德 哈維爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1295年9月13日之前在德國布藍登波格布藍登波格 安 德 哈維爾。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Judith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘Jewess’ or ‘woman from Judea’, borne by a Jewish heroine whose story is recorded in the Book of Judith in the Apocrypha. Judith is portrayed as a beautiful widow who delivers her people from the invading Assyrians by gaining the confidence of their commander, Holofernes, and cutting off his head while he is asleep; without their commander, the Assyrians are duly routed. This has been a perennially popular Jewish name. In the English-speaking world it was taken up in the 16th century, having been in occasional use among Gentiles before this: for example, it was borne by a niece of William the Conqueror. It enjoyed great popularity between the 1940s and the 1960s. Today's notable bearers include the American novelist  Judith Krantz  (  b. 1928 ) and the Scottish composer  Judith Weir  (  b. 1954 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Judith von Henneberg-Coburg was born in 1247, in Coburg, Saxe-Coburg and Gotha, her father, Hermann I. Graf von Henneberg, was 23 and her mother, Margaretha van Holland, was 13. She married Otto V. Markgraf von Brandenburg on 22 October 1268, in Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died before 13 September 1295, in Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Judith von Henneberg-Coburg est née en 1247, à Coburg, Herzogtum Sachsen-Coburg und Gotha, son père, Hermann I. Graf von Henneberg, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Margaretha van Holland, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Otto V. Markgraf von Brandenburg le 22 octobre 1268, à Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée avant 13 septembre 1295, à Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Judith von Henneberg-Coburg 1247 in Coburg, Herzogtum Sachsen-Coburg und Gotha geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hermann I. Graf von Henneberg 23 und ihre Mutter Margaretha van Holland 13. Sie hat am 22. Oktober 1268 in Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Deutschland Otto V. Markgraf von Brandenburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb vor 13. September 1295 in Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Deutschland.

Graf von Hennebergは23歳，母Margaretha van Hollandは13歳であった。1268年10月22日にドイツブランデンブルグブランデンブルグ アン ダー ヘイベルでOtto V. ko.lifeSummary: Judith von Henneberg-Coburg(이)가 1247년 허초그투 작센-컵르그 운드 가스아 컵르그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hermann I. Graf von Henneberg(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaretha van Holland(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1268년 10월 22일 독일 브랜덴버그 브랜덴버그 앤 데르 하벨에서 Otto V. Markgraf von Brandenburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1295년 9월 13일 이전 독일 브랜덴버그 브랜덴버그 앤 데르 하벨에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Judith von Henneberg-Coburg родилась в 1247 г. в местности кобург, хирзогтум сачсен-кобург унд гота, её отцу по имени Hermann I. Graf von Henneberg было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margaretha van Holland, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Otto V. Markgraf von Brandenburg 22 октября 1268 г. в местности брэнденбург ан дир хавел, брэнденбург, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла перед 13 сентябрь 1295 г. в местности брэнденбург ан дир хавел, брэнденбург, Германия.
